scripts.predev: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
